info.name: Demo Examples
info.description:
In this collection, seed data is provided to create the necessary configuration for account creation. To run the seed scripts, follow these steps in the specified order:

1. Click on the **\[initial-setup - owned by AM Team\]** folder and select the target environment from the list of available environment variables.
    
2. Click the **\[Run\]** button at the top right of the screen. As a result, the environment will be configured with the required account and profile settings, as described in the following URL: \[[https://irdeto.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/IE/pages/6324846782/Seed+Data](https://irdeto.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/IE/pages/6324846782/Seed+Data)\].
    
3. Once the seed setup is successfully completed, navigate to the **\[create-account\]** folder and use the API to create your account.
    
4. Use the **\[accountId\]** provided by the identity provider (IDP), such as Cognito in the DEV environment, to proceed with account creation.

item.name: [INTERNAL] Create Suspect User (WM) Account Block Reason
[INTERNAL] Create Suspect User (CDN) Account Block Reason

item.name: consumer-login

request.description: Serves profile session token in profile selection, and login session token/profile session token when refreshing.

item.description:
To be able to get a consumer session token.

1. **Trigger Consumer Login Request:**
    
    1. Send a login request to `[CONSUMER] Login`.
        
    2. The 302 redirect response will include a redirect URL in the `Location` headers
        
    3. Ensure you have automatic redirects disable in your postman settings.
        
2. **Perform Login via IDP:**
    
    1. Open the redirect URL in your browser.
        
    2. This will take you to the Identity Provider (IDP) login page.
        
    3. Enter your credentials and complete the login process.
        
    4. You will be redirected to localhost. Copy the `code` from the url.
        
3. **Obtain Session Token:**
    
    1. Use the copied code in the `[CONSUMER] Token - Login Session` request.
        
    2. This request will return the session token.

url.raw: {{baseUrl_irdetoAuth}}/v1/oauth/token?code_verifier={{irdeto_auth_code_verifier}}&nonce={{irdeto_auth_nonce}}&grant_type=urn%3Aietf%3Aparams%3Aoauth%3Agrant-type%3Atoken-exchange&subject_token={{irdeto_auth_id_token}}&subject_token_type=urn%3Aietf%3Aparams%3Aoauth%3Atoken-type%3Aid_token&tenant={{irdeto_auth_tenant}}&service={{irdeto_auth_service}}&audience=manage&scope=manage:viewer manage:edit-account manage:edit-devices manage:edit-profile manage:edit-settings manage:edit-product-catalog manage:edit-cohort manage:edit-software-update manage:edit-device-config manage:edit-device-config-all manage:edit-device-config:ad manage:edit-device-config:attestation manage:edit-device-config:configuration manage:edit-device-config:experience manage:edit-device-config:fingerprint manage:edit-device-config:softwareUpdates manage:edit-device-config:dictionary manage:edit-device-config:engagement manage:edit-device-config:player manage:edit-device-config:learnActions manage:data-extract
